title: Apply Double-Angle Identity
text: Choose the appropriate double-angle formula for cos(2θ) to express it in terms of cos(θ).

title: Form a Quadratic Equation
text: Substitute the identity and rearrange the equation into a quadratic form.

title: Find θ Values
text: Determine the values of θ in the interval $$0$$ \leq θ < $$2\pi$$ that satisfy the solutions for cos(θ).
